prompt: Create an emotional Japanese movie trailer banner poster in a tall vertical composition, cinematic anime illustration style, set on a rainy nighttime city street in Japan filled with wet asphalt reflections, neon shop signs, and softly blurred high-rise buildings receding into the distance. In the center foreground, show 1 young anime girl in side profile facing left, standing alone under 1 transparent plastic umbrella with visible raindrops. She has long dark purple hair tied in a high ponytail, a slightly melancholic expression, and wears an oversized teal hoodie layered under a loose pink-and-teal plaid jacket. The mood is lonely, wistful, and dramatic, like a heartfelt live-action Japanese film advertisement reimagined as anime key art. Use cool blue and cyan tones with pink neon accents, glossy rain reflections, shallow depth of field, soft atmospheric haze, and subtle rim lighting from street signs. Add large handwritten white Japanese title text at the top reading {argument name="title text" default="AIの涙"}, with 1 smaller white subtitle line beneath it reading {argument name="tagline text" default="彼女は、なぜ泣いたのか。"}. At the bottom, add 1 bold white release line reading {argument name="release text" default="2024年秋 全国ロードショー"}. Keep the character as the emotional focal point, framed mid-shot from about waist up, umbrella arcing over her head, with the empty rain-soaked street behind her emphasizing isolation and cinematic sadness.
translatedPrompt: 创作一张情感向的日本电影预告片横幅海报，采用高垂直构图，电影级动漫插画风格。背景设定在日本雨夜的城市街道，地面铺满湿润的沥青路面反射，霓虹灯招牌林立，远处的高楼大厦在朦胧中隐去。画面中心前景处，展示 1 位年轻动漫少女的侧影，面向左侧，独自站在 1 把透明塑料伞下，伞面可见雨滴。她留着深紫色长发，扎成高马尾，表情略显忧郁，身穿一件超大号青色连帽衫，外搭一件宽松的粉青格纹外套。整体氛围孤独、感伤且富有戏剧性，如同将真人大片重新演绎为动漫主视觉图。使用冷蓝色和青色调，点缀粉色霓虹灯光，呈现出光泽感的雨水反射、浅景深效果、柔和的大气朦胧感，以及来自街道招牌的微妙轮廓光。在顶部添加醒目的手写体白色日文标题 {argument name="title text" default="AIの涙"}，下方添加 1 行较小的白色副标题 {argument name="tagline text" default="彼女は、なぜ泣いたのか。"}。在底部添加 1 行粗体白色上映日期 {argument name="release text" default="2024年秋 全国ロードショー"}。保持角色作为情感焦点，采用腰部以上的半身构图，雨伞在头顶呈弧形，背景中空旷且被雨水浸湿的街道进一步强调了孤独感与电影般的悲伤氛围。

breakdown.creativeCore: 雨中日本电影横幅：一张垂直的动漫风格电影横幅，展示了一名撑伞的孤单少女站在霓虹闪烁的雨夜街道上，非常适合作为情感向日本电影海报或预告片的主视觉图。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: rim light, neon, shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
